_trn_search_syntax_description: You can search addons in multiple ways:
_trn_search_syntax_urls: Paste CurseForge or Modrinth links directly
_trn_search_syntax_addon_type: Select addon type (mods, modpacks, etc.) on the left
_trn_search_syntax_filters: Filter by categories and more on the right
_trn_welcome_gdlauncher_text:
Hey {{user}}!

We're thrilled to have you onboard! GDLauncher is your personal Minecraft command center, designed to supercharge your gaming experience. 

From custom instances and integrated mod search to performance tweaking and design customization - everything you need is at your fingertips.

Ready to craft your perfect Minecraft adventure? Let's get started!

The GDLauncher Team
_trn_manage_more_options_from_settings: You can always change these settings later from the settings page, as well as many other options
_trn_import_instance_text: To start enjoying your favorite game you will need to create an instance. You can do this by selecting one of the modpacks available or by importing a zip or an instance from another launcher on your computer
_trn_java_title: Do you want the launcher to automatically handle Java for you? It will also download a managed Java version if you don't have the correct one
